Here is the complete structured analysis of the file from line 200 to end.

---

### SUMMARY

Scanned `TeamFlyout.tsx` lines 200–893 against the project's existing design tokens in `index.css` and `tailwind.config.js`. The file uses extensive raw Tailwind utility classes with hardcoded color values (`slate-*`, `emerald-*`, `sky-*`, etc.), inline `style=` for shadows and gradients, and arbitrary-value classes. Many classes can be aligned to the existing `--card`, `--border`, `--muted`, `--muted-foreground`, `--shadow-card`, `--spacing-*` tokens, but the file's 6 distinct "glow" shadow themes (sky, amber, emerald, purple, team-hue) currently have no token equivalents and would need new token definitions.

### EVIDENCE

- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:507-509` — SheetContent `className` with `bg-[#0a1623]`, `border-slate-700/60`, complex shadow strings

- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:576-583` — Win-rate bar bg + fill gradient + inline `boxShadow`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:601` — Upcoming match card: `bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800/80 to-amber-950/10 ... shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(245,158,11,0.08)]`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:637,691,857` — Empty states: `rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/40 p-4 text-sm text-slate-400`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:653` — Player card with hover: `bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800/60 to-slate-800/20` + `hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(56,189,248,0.18)]`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:717` — Hero row: `bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/80 p-2.5`

- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:779` — Match row: `rounded-lg border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/40 p-3`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:805` — Score button with dynamic `resultCls`: `border-emerald-500/60 text-emerald-300` / `border-red-500/60 text-red-300` / `border-slate-600 text-slate-200`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\TeamFlyout.tsx:864` — Load-more button: `rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/40`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\index.css:1-37` — Existing design tokens: `--card`, `--border`, `--muted`, `--muted-foreground`, `--shadow-card`, `--shadow-modal`, `--spacing-card`, `--spacing-section`, `--spacing-row`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\tailwind.config.js:1-80` — Token-bound color definitions: `card`, `border`, `muted`, `muted-foreground`, `secondary`

### CHANGES

None.

### RISKS

- **Hardcoded `bg-[#0a1623]` matches `--card` token but breaks if the token is ever themed differently** — the value is currently identical (`#0a1623`), so replacing with `bg-card` is safe but must be verified against any future theme variants.
- **Six distinct glow-shadow themes (sky/amber/emerald/purple/teamHue-dynamic/dark) are used inline** — if new `--shadow-glow-*` tokens are created, the dynamic `teamHue` shadow (line 529) cannot be fully tokenized and should remain inline or use a CSS custom property set via `style`.
- **Gradient backgrounds (`bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800/80 to-amber-950/10` etc.) have no token equivalent** — Tailwind gradient stops require raw color values; tokenizing these would need utility classes in `@layer utilities` or a `tailwind.config.js` gradient extension.
- **Focus-visible rings use `focus-visible:ring-sky-400` rather than the token `ring-ring` (red)** — this is an intentional visual choice (sky accent on dark), but switching to `ring-ring` would change appearance to red; this should stay as-is unless a `ring-accent` token is defined.
- **`text-slate-100`/`text-slate-200` are used as foreground text instead of `text-foreground` or `text-card-foreground`** — these map closely to the tokens (foreground = `210 100% 96%` ≈ slate-100) but are not semantically bound. Mitigation: audit visually if replacing.

### BLOCKERS

None.

I now have comprehensive evidence. Here is the structured report.

---

### SUMMARY

Read `MatchDetailModal.tsx` from line 50 to end (2030 lines total), capturing every Dialog/Sheet wrapper, TabsList/TabsTrigger, card section, button, and hardcoded color token. The component uses a dark theme via Tailwind's `slate` scale plus three hardcoded hex gradients (`from-[#0e1420]`, `from-[#0a1623]`, `bg-[#0c1522]`) and one hardcoded `rgba` box-shadow. Slate-950 appears in ~5 places as `bg-slate-950/XX`. All findings are cited below with line ranges.

---

### EVIDENCE

#### (1) DialogContent className

- **Desktop `DialogContent`** — `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\MatchDetailModal.tsx:1266-1272`
  ```
  className={`overflow-y-auto bg-gradient-to-b from-[#0a1623] to-[#061220] border-slate-700/60 rounded-lg shadow-[0_8px_24px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45),0_0_40px_rgba(0,50,100,0.15)] p-3 sm:p-6 ${
    isPrototypeMode ? 'w-[96vw] sm:max-w-[1360px] max-h-[94vh]' : 'w-[82vw] sm:max-w-6xl max-h-[90vh]'
  }`}
  ```
  Also: `showCloseButton={false}`, `aria-describedby={undefined}`, `data-visual-role="match-detail-modal"`.

- **Mobile `SheetContent`** — `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\components\custom\MatchDetailModal.tsx:1230`
  ```
  className="w-full sm:max-w-2xl bg-slate-900 border-slate-700 text-slate-100 p-0 overscroll-contain"
  ```
  (`side="left"`, `showCloseButton={false}`)

- **Mobile close button** — `:1235`
  ```
  className="absolute right-3 top-3 z-20 inline-flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/90 text-slate-200 shadow-lg backdrop-blur transition hover:bg-slate-800"
  ```

#### (2) TabsList / TabsTrigger styling

- **TabsList (prototype mode)** — `:709-711`
  ```
  "mb-4 flex w-full border-b border-slate-800 bg-transparent p-0 h-auto gap-0"
  ```
- **TabsList (non-prototype mode)** — `:711`
  ```
  "bg-slate-800/50 mb-4 flex w-full flex-wrap gap-1 p-1 sm:flex-nowrap"
  ```

- **TabsTrigger (prototype mode – all 5 tabs share same pattern)** — `:715-719`
  ```
  "rounded-none border-b-2 border-b-transparent pb-2 pt-1 px-4 text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 data-[state=active]:border-b-orange-500 data-[state=active]:bg-transparent data-[state=active]:text-white data-[state=active]:shadow-none"
  ```
  Tabs: 概览 (`:715`), 阵容选择 (`:716`), 比赛数据 (`:717`), 比赛进程 (`:718`), 历史交锋 (`:719`).

- **TabsTrigger (non-prototype mode – 4 tabs)** — `:723-734`
  ```
  "data-[state=active]:bg-slate-700 text-xs sm:text-sm min-w-[80px] grow basis-[48%] sm:flex-1 sm:basis-auto"
  ```
  Tabs: KDA (`:723`), 经济 (`:726`), 对线 (`:729`), AI战报 (`:732`).

#### (3) Card / section bg and border colors

Key card/section containers (not exhaustive, but representative):

| Line(s) | Element | Classes |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `:518` | Series map tabs wrapper (non-prototype) | `rounded-xl border border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-950/40` |
| `:526-529` | Series map tab buttons | `rounded-xl border … border-red-400/60 bg-red-500/10` (active) / `border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/75` (inactive) |
| `:579` | Prototype hero header card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#0e1420] to-[#0a0f1a] border-b border-slate-800/60` |
| `:666` | Non-prototype compact header | `border-b border-slate-800` |
| `:744` | Map tabs row (prototype overview) | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/60` |
| `:807` | Net worth comparison card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/40` |
| `:903` | Graphs container | `rounded-xl bg-slate-900/30` |
| `:906` | Key events sidebar | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50` |
| `:969` | Team roster card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/30` |
| `:1018` | Draft tab card | `rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/50` |
| `:1086` | History match cards | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/40` |
| `:1191` | 相关比赛 card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800` |
| `:1192` | 相关比赛 header | `bg-slate-800/80` |
| `:1343` | PrototypeOverview picks card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-[#0c1522]` |
| `:1451` | MatchDataTable team card | `rounded-xl border border-slate-800` |
| `:1453` | MatchDataTable team header | `bg-slate-800/40 border-b border-slate-800` |
| `:1460` | MatchDataTable column header | `bg-slate-900/60 divide-x divide-slate-800` |
| `:1617` | TeamSummaryTable outer card | `border-green-500/30 bg-green-500/5` (winner) / `border-slate-800` (loser) |
| `:1618` | TeamSummaryTable header | `bg-slate-800/40 border-b border-slate-800 border-l-2` |
| `:1633` | TeamSummaryTable desktop header row | `bg-slate-900/70 divide-x divide-slate-800` |
| `:1645` | TeamSummaryTable body | `bg-slate-900/10 divide-y divide-slate-800/80` |
| `:1751` | TeamSummaryTable totals row | `bg-slate-900/40 border-t border-slate-800` |
| `:1782` | Mobile player card | `rounded-lg border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/40` |
| `:1978` | ItemStrip collapsible wrapper | `rounded-md border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/30` |

#### (4) Hardcoded non-token colors (slate-950 + hex/rgba)

**`slate-950` occurrences:**

| Line | Context |
|------|---------|
| `:518` | `bg-slate-950/40` — series map tabs wrapper |
| `:744` | `bg-slate-950/60` — map tabs row |
| `:1018` | `bg-slate-950/50` — draft tab card |
| `:1822` | `bg-slate-950/50` — mobile player stat cell (等级) |
| `:1825` | `bg-slate-950/50` — mobile player stat cell (正补/反补) |
| `:1828` | `bg-slate-950/50` — mobile player stat cell (NET) |
| `:1831` | `bg-slate-950/50` — mobile player stat cell (GPM/XPM) |
| `:1978` | `bg-slate-950/30` — ItemStrip collapsible wrapper |

**Hardcoded hex/rgba values (not Tailwind tokens):**

| Line | Value | Context |
|------|-------|---------|
| `:579` | `from-[#0e1420] to-[#0a0f1a]` | Prototype hero header gradient |
| `:1269` | `from-[#0a1623] to-[#061220]` | DialogContent gradient background |
| `:1269` | `shadow-[0_8px_24px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45),0_0_40px_rgba(0,50,100,0.15)]` | DialogContent box-shadow |
| `:1343` | `bg-[#0c1522]` | PrototypeOverview picks card background |

**Arbitrary width values (not Tailwind tokens):**

| Line | Value | Context |
|------|-------|---------|
| `:1270` | `w-[96vw] sm:max-w-[1360px] max-h-[94vh]` | DialogContent prototype sizing |
| `:1270` | `w-[82vw] sm:max-w-6xl max-h-[90vh]` | DialogContent non-prototype sizing |

---

### CHANGES

None.

---

### RISKS

- **Inconsistent theming**: Three different hardcoded dark gradients (`#0e1420→#0a0f1a`, `#0a1623→#061220`, `#0c1522`) are used alongside Tailwind's `slate-900`/`slate-950` tokens. If the design system ever shifts base colors, these hex values would drift out of alignment. Mitigation: replace with CSS custom properties or Tailwind theme tokens.
- **`slate-950` is a Tailwind v3.3+ one-off**: It sits outside the standard `50-900` scale and may not be present in all Tailwind configs. Currently used in 6+ places; if the config drops it, those backgrounds fall back unpredictably. Mitigation: verify `slate-950` is defined in the project's `tailwind.config` or replace with `slate-900` variants.
- **No `DialogClose` rendered**: Both mobile (`SheetContent`) and desktop (`DialogContent`) suppress the built-in close button (`showCloseButton={false}`) and the desktop Dialog never renders a manual close button (only mobile does at `:1232`). Users on desktop must click outside or press Escape to dismiss — this may be intentional but is a UX risk.
- **`slate-950/40` on series map wrapper (`:518`)**: Semi-transparent on what may be a dark gradient background may result in very low contrast. Mitigation: test visually and consider a solid or higher-opacity variant.

---

### BLOCKERS

None.

agents.result:
Now I have all the data needed. Let me compile the structured analysis.

---

### SUMMARY

I read the entire `HomeDashboard.tsx` (lines 100–1153) and mapped every JSX section across 8 components: `MobileMatchToolbar`, `FeaturedEventBanner`, `RailPanel`, `LiveMatchCard`, `UpcomingMatchCard`, `PrototypeDashboardContent`, and the main `HomeDashboard` return block (which includes `RailPanel` instances for sidebar). The project's design tokens (in `index.css` + `tailwind.config.js`) define `--background` as `hsl(207,83%,4%)` (`#020B15` → `bg-background`), `--card` as `hsl(210,56%,9%)` (`#0A1623` → `bg-card`), `--radius` as `0.75rem` (`rounded-lg`), `rounded-xl` as `calc(var(--radius)+4px)` = `16px`, and `--shadow-card` as `0 8px 24px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)`. I identified **1** `slate-950` background misuse, **2** `rounded-lg`→`rounded-xl` mismatches, **4** `bg-slate-800` hardcoded surfaces missing proper tokens, **11** `bg-slate-700` hardcoded surfaces, and **6** components/sections lacking any shadow class. No `slate-700/60` border mismatches were found.

### EVIDENCE

- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:955` – root wrapper uses `bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-900/40 via-slate-950 to-slate-950`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:620` – tab button uses `rounded-lg`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:1048` – news image placeholder uses `rounded-lg` + `bg-slate-800`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:433` – LiveMatchCard uses `bg-slate-800/80`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:670` – prototype hot-teams section uses `bg-slate-800`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:700` – prototype hot-players section uses `bg-slate-800`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:539` – UpcomingMatchCard root, no shadow class
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:372` – FeaturedEventBanner upcoming cards, no shadow class
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:256,272` – MobileMatchToolbar tab bar & date pill, no shadow class
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:1046` – news cards in sidebar, no shadow class
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:377,384,459,477,493,547,556,565,571,685,1013` – 11 `bg-slate-700` / `bg-slate-700/50` occurrences on fallback avatars, map pills, badges
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\index.css:7-9` – token definitions: `--background: 207 83% 4%`, `--card: 210 56% 9%`, `--radius: 0.75rem`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\tailwind.config.js:24-29` – `rounded-xl: calc(var(--radius) + 4px)`, `rounded-lg: var(--radius)`
- `C:\Users\MOGEEEEEE\Dotahub\apps\web\src\sections\HomeDashboard.tsx:406` – RailPanel as reference: `rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.045] p-4 shadow-[0_18px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.22)]`

### CHANGES

None.

### RISKS

- **`bg-slate-700` fallback avatars (×11 occurrences)**: These are fallback elements inside `<SafeImg>` when no team logo loads. Changing them to `bg-card` or `bg-muted` is low risk and aligns with tokens. Mitigation: replace `bg-slate-700` with `bg-card` (which maps to `#0A1623`, a very dark blue that visually matches the current near-black slate).
- **`bg-slate-800` on prototype sections (lines 670, 700, 433)**: These create visual inconsistency with `RailPanel` (line 406) which uses `bg-white/[0.045]`. Prototype sections are dev-only (`prototypeMode` flag), so risk is limited to developer preview. Mitigation: align to `bg-card` or `bg-white/[0.045]` to match `RailPanel`.
- **Root `slate-950` gradient (line 955)**: The `via-slate-950 to-slate-950` tail conflicts with `bg-background`. Changing to `via-background to-background` may shift the visual slightly since `bg-background` resolves to a slightly different hue (`#020B15` vs Tailwind's slate-950 `#020617`). Mitigation: test visually; substitute `bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-900/40 via-background to-background`.
- **Missing shadows on 6 surfaces**: Adding `shadow-[var(--shadow-card)]` or the `card-hover` utility class to cards that currently lack shadows will increase visual depth and match the `RailPanel` treatment. Mitigation: apply `shadow-[0_8px_24px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45)]` (matching `--shadow-card`) to `UpcomingMatchCard`, `FeaturedEventBanner` upcoming cards, news cards, and `MobileMatchToolbar` containers.

### BLOCKERS

None.
